task: Rewrite and merge CAPABILITIES.md into README.md
patterns: Consolidated disparate documentation files into a high-impact 'System Capabilities' section in the main README.
Used HTML tags in Markdown for centered image alignment and custom width control.
Renamed and moved provided assets to a standard 'public/assets' directory for consistency.
gotchas: Always check the 'brain' directory for attached media files when a user provides an image in the chat.
proposals: Prefer a single 'Source of Truth' for system features in the README over multiple small documentation files.
